title: production-config
description: One-time pre-flight decisions for a comic project run end-to-end by /build-comic autopilot. Written by the production-briefing skill at <project>/production-config.json. Consumed by build-comic.md (autopilot mode), comic-production SKILL.md (rules block), shotlist-driven-flow.md (per-panel loop), continuity-check SKILL.md (regen policy), and optionally next_panel.py (--config).

root.description: Absolute path to project root, e.g. /Users/jay/Desktop/claude/devotion-2

brand.description: Optional — which brand the comic belongs to. Used by status board for color theming. Conventionally tied to transformation_type but not required to be: GrowGetter=fmg, Bloom=be|glute, MaxxMuscle=mmg, 3DMC=fmg|mmg|mixed.

transformation_type.description: Primary transformation arc. Drives rule-block defaults, lineup-file selection, prompt-template emphasis. fmg = Female Muscle Growth (default for GrowGetter). be = Breast Expansion (default for Bloom Beauty BE arcs). glute = Glute / butt expansion (default for Bloom Beauty glute arcs). mmg = Male Muscle Growth (default for MaxxMuscle, male 3DMC). mixed = multi-arc (e.g. BE + glute + FMG over the same comic) — uses all rules, manual per-panel emphasis.

transformation_subtype.description: Optional. Free-form qualifier for narrower control: 'be-hyperbreast', 'glute-hyperbutt', 'fmg-hyperreal', 'mmg-bodybuilder', 'mmg-superhero'. Surfaces in prompt-template hints. null = use the type's standard template.

lineup_files.description: Which numbered-size lineup PNGs to use for visual size anchoring. next_panel.py's find_lineup() searches these filenames under project-local references/style/, repo-bundled assets/, ~/.claude/skills/comic-production/assets/. Defaults map to the FMG lineups bundled with the repo; override for other transformation types by creating the file in references/style/ of the project.

tier_low.description: Lineup file for tiers 1-6 of the active transformation. FMG default: muscle-size-lineup.png. BE: drop in breast-size-lineup.png. Glute: glute-size-lineup.png. MMG: male-muscle-lineup.png.

tier_high.description: Lineup file for tiers 4-9 (hypermuscular range). Optional — only needed if your story tiers cross 6.

active_range.description: auto = next_panel.py picks based on the panel's tier value. low = always use tier_low. high = always use tier_high.

platform.description: higgsfield = paid+scriptable runner. flow = free on Pro, browser-driven via Chrome MCP. hybrid = explore in Flow then port to Higgsfield.

value.description: Filesystem path for path/existing-shotlist, raw prose for inline

mandatory_rules.description: Which rules from comic-production/SKILL.md lines 303-316 are baked into every panel prompt. Defaults vary by transformation_type — see briefing skill's per-type defaults table.

active.description: Rule numbers that are ON. Per-type defaults: fmg=[1..10]. be=[2,4,5,6,7,8,9] + extra BE growth-non-regression line. glute=[2,4,5,6,7,8,9] + extra glute growth-non-regression line. mmg=[1,2,4,5,6,7,8,9,10] (drop 3 since male, no breasts). mixed=[1..10].

extra_lines.description: Project-specific addendums. Per-type recommended additions: BE → 'Breast size monotonic across panels — once larger, never smaller'. Glute → 'Glute size and hip-to-waist ratio monotonic — once curvier, never narrower'. MMG → 'Male anatomy throughout — never feminize the silhouette during growth'. Mixed → state which arcs apply to which characters.

folder_id.description: Higgsfield folder ID for this project

use_unlim_override.description: Leave null — runner derives from ref_type automatically

fan_out.description: Verbatim re-run fan-out policy. Omni UI: one chat submit = ONE image regardless of the Agent-settings count (keep that setting at 1); variants cost a follow-up verbatim re-run message. novel-and-weak = fan out on novel panels (new pose, stage change, money-shot) or a weak first result, per shotlist-driven-flow.md 'Defaults on Flow'. always = fan out on every panel. never = single submit only, re-roll on demand. Replaces the dead pill-UI default_count field — the count setting no longer fans out.

aspect_override.description: null = derive per panel from camera category

max_panels.description: Hard cap on panel count; halt if shotlist exceeds. null = no cap.

max_retries_per_panel.description: After this many bad rolls in a row on one panel → halt.

on_all_bad.description: What to do when all variants in a batch fail QA.

pick_variant.description: claude = autonomous per shotlist-driven-flow.md step 6. user = adds per-panel gate.

growth_sequence_order.description: For mixed/multi-stage transformations, the order of progression per posing-and-expressions.md. Default for fmg=['breasts','glutes','muscles']. Default for be=['breasts']. Default for glute=['glutes']. Default for mmg=['muscles'].

policies.description: How autopilot handles each previously-interactive gate.

post_render_audit.description: Vision-audit (audit_panels.py) regen behavior. Mirrors `regeneration` above but governs the per-panel vision rubric pass, not the cross-panel continuity audit. The audit itself is always report-only; this policy controls what happens to its findings.

mode.description: never = log to defects.jsonl only, no regen-queue.md. batch-end = also write regen-queue.md at run end for human pickup (or for a runner to walk). auto-on-hard = same queue write today; a future runner integration will walk the queue automatically up to max_retries_per_panel (Phase 8 work — not yet wired in audit_panels.py itself). halt-on-hard = write the queue and exit 1 so an autopilot orchestrator can detect the halt without parsing stdout.

max_retries_per_panel.description: Per-panel retry ceiling for auto-on-hard mode. 0 disables retries even in auto-on-hard.

retry_strategy.description: same-prompt-new-seed = re-render with identical prompt, letting model variance produce a different result. per-rule-corrections = invoke each failed rule's retry_strategy() to derive a corrected prompt (Phase 8 work — not yet wired).

arc_character.description: Slug of the character whose tier should be checked for monotonic non-regression. null = auto-infer from shotlist.

monotonic_attribute.description: Which numeric field rules_audit.py enforces non-regression on. auto = derive from transformation_type: fmg/mmg/mixed→muscle_size_tier, be→breast_size_tier, glute→glute_size_tier.

halt_conditions.description: The ONLY conditions autopilot is permitted to halt on (besides successful completion). All four are required-on; listed here for transparency.

version.description: Schema version. Bumped to 2 on 2026-05-13 to add transformation_type, transformation_subtype, lineup_files, continuity.monotonic_attribute, generation.growth_sequence_order. v1 configs are forward-compatible — missing fields default to FMG behavior.
